Class epp.UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----java.lang.Throwable
           |
           +----java.lang.Exception
                   |
                   +----java.lang.RuntimeException
                           |
                           +----epp.UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException
public class UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException
extends RuntimeException
The UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException class is an exception thrown when you access a dynamic variable that is not bound.

See Also:
Dynamic

UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException(String)

UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException 
 public UnboundDynamicVariableAccessException(String s)
